question: The chart shows how time is allocated on a typical day. Based on the data, which of the following statements is most accurate?

options.A: Chores take up less time than Leisure.
options.B: The combined time for Commute and Work is greater than the time spent on Chores.
options.C: Chores take up about as much time as all other activities combined.
options.D: The combined time for Leisure, Work, and Commute is greater than the time spent on Chores.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Chores: 45%; Leisure: 22%; Work: 18%; Commute: 15%.
